ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trade_data" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trade data */,
  "destination_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination country */,
  "origin_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin country */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the trade (in thousands of USD) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trade entry */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., export, import) */,
  "trade_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade category */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the trade value is recorded */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of trade (if applicable) */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the volume */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Exact date of the trade entry */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the trade data entry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the trade entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_destination_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_trade_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_category_id") REFERENCES trade_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_origin_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Primary currency used in the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL of the country's flag */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the country data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year of the trade data */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is the current year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the year data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade entry the note is associated with */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_notes_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., policymaker, researcher, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trade data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trade category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the category data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_data_categories" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_categories_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES trade_categories ("category_id")
)
